clusters.leadHeadline: FCC Scrutiny Intensifies on NFL Media Strategy
clusters.summary: Washington regulators question NFL's broadcasting approach as league faces growing federal oversight. Regulatory pressure could reshape how the NFL distributes media rights and negotiates broadcast deals.

clusters.leadHeadline: WNBA's New TV Deal Puts Caitlin Clark on National Stage
clusters.summary: All 44 Fever games broadcasting nationally signals WNBA's media rights expansion and athlete monetization strategy. First season of new rights deal capitalizes on Clark's rookie star power and broader women's sports growth.

clusters.leadHeadline: Churchill Downs Acquires Preakness Stakes IP Rights for $85M
clusters.summary: Kentucky Derby operator gains control of second leg of Triple Crown intellectual property in major consolidation move. Acquisition centralizes racing's marquee event marketing and merchandising under single operator.

clusters.leadHeadline: NWSL Awards 18th Franchise to Columbus for $205M
clusters.summary: Haslam Sports Group lands women's soccer expansion team, marking NWSL's continued growth into underserved markets. Expansion fee demonstrates league's rising valuation and investor appetite for women's professional sports.

clusters.leadHeadline: Illinois Races Against Clock on $5B Bears Stadium Plan
clusters.summary: State legislature accelerates $5 billion package for NFL franchise as relocation deadline looms. Deal hinges on public-private financing and could reshape Chicago's sports landscape if completed.

clusters.leadHeadline: Royals' New $3B Stadium Strikes Downtown Development Deal
clusters.summary: Kansas City MLB franchise secures major real estate partnership with Hallmark Cards for new arena project. Development deal demonstrates how stadium projects now leverage broader mixed-use development revenue streams.

clusters.leadHeadline: NIL Dispute Over 'Associated Entities' Threatens College Salary Cap
clusters.summary: Regulatory ambiguity around NIL deal definitions could eliminate college athletics' ability to enforce spending limits. Loophole threatens structural integrity of recently implemented scholarship caps across Division I.

clusters.leadHeadline: Rogers Communications Eyes $18B Valuation for Sports Team Sale
clusters.summary: Canadian media giant seeks premium exit from sports ownership at aggressive valuation multiple. Sale timing reflects broader consolidation pressures in North American sports media and broadcasting.

poll.question: Which will drive more sports business value growth over next 3 years?
options: Women's sports media rights expansion (WNBA, NWSL)

predictions.statement: FCC regulatory framework on NFL media rights adopted by end of 2026
predictions.rationale: Growing Washington scrutiny and public pressure mounting; league beginning formal defense suggests rulemaking process underway

predictions.statement: Illinois approves $5B Bears stadium financing package by June 2026
predictions.rationale: Legislature racing against relocation deadline; strong political momentum and cross-party support for deal documented

predictions.statement: NWSL reaches $2B+ total franchise valuation by 2027
predictions.rationale: Columbus expansion at $205M, national media coverage of Clark, and sustained investor interest in women's sports trajectory

predictions.statement: College NIL 'associated entities' loophole codified into NCAA policy by 2025
predictions.rationale: Regulatory ambiguity persists; schools benefit from current flexibility, reducing incentive for strict enforcement

predictions.statement: Rogers sells sports teams at $18B+ valuation within 18 months
predictions.rationale: First-quarter results trigger sale timeline; Canadian market consolidation pressures and premium valuation multiples support transaction

picks.matchup: Kansas City Royals vs Detroit Tigers
picks.edge: Royals energized by new $3B stadium deal struck this week; downtown development agreement signals long-term stability and organizational momentum. Home team confidence typically elevated after major ownership/facility announcements.

Illinois Bears stadium crisis creating statewide financial/political distraction affecting Chicago sports climate. Cubs may lack focus with city's sports infrastructure uncertainty dominating local media.

picks.matchup: WNBA: Indiana Fever vs Connecticut Sun
picks.edge: Caitlin Clark elevated to national stage via new WNBA TV deal; Fever home games now receiving premium media attention and marketing push. Team likely energized by increased spotlight and franchise value surge.
